message:
feat(events): add sequence bounds and timestamp to GapDetected event

Extend Event::GapDetected with seq_before, seq_after, and detected_at_ms
fields to carry authoritative gap boundary information from detection
through the entire event pipeline.

Previously, wire_protocol would set seq_before/seq_after to 0 and
generate a fresh timestamp, losing the original detection context.
Now the event carries its own bounds from the source, enabling:
- SSE gap frames with sequence boundary context
- Wire protocol GapNotice with original detection timestamp
- Accurate gap reporting in distributed mode

Updated all call sites and tests across events, runtime, web, web/sse,
and wire_protocol modules to include the new fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
